applications.name: MK_editor
applications.purpose: Editor core remains validated through MK_editor_core and tools/build-gui.ps1 while the visible editor shell is deferred until a first-party native desktop backend lands. The deleted legacy SDL3/Dear ImGui shell is no longer a build, package, or dependency surface. Editor-core models continue to cover project IO, authoring, import/review rows, playtest reviews, diagnostics, and AI-operable handoff contracts without exposing SDL3, Dear ImGui, renderer/RHI handles, package execution, arbitrary shell, or native handles.
